# CWE-267 — Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-267-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Vulnerable: reviewer role may delete arbitrary paths from disk.
func ReviewerPurge(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodDelete {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-Role") != "reviewer" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	target := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	if target == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing path", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_ = os.Remove(target)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
